channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: After withdrawing as attorney general nominee, Matt Gaetz lands a talk show on OANN television
item.description: Former congressman Matt Gaetz, who withdrew last month as President-elect Trump's nominee to be U.S. attorney general, has landed a job with the One America News Network.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Speaker Johnson says 'still some concern' about Elon Musk-backed online safety bill
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson suggested he still has hang-ups about the Kids Online Safety Act after senators worked with X to reform it over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justice Department ignored some policies when seizing reporters' phone records, watchdog finds
item.description: Federal prosecutors sidestepped some Justice Department rules when they seized the phone records of reporters as part of media leak investigations during the Trump administration, according to a new watchdog report being released as the aggressive practice of hunting for journalists’ sources could a
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New York voters want state to support Trump deportations, poll finds
item.description: President-elect Trump’s mass deportation plans have majority support among voters in New York state, according to a new poll released Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rachel Morin's mom pleads senators 'hear our cries for help' in mass deportations hearing testimony
item.description: During a hearing on mass deportation and its effects, Patty Morin will testify about her daughter and her killing, allegedly at the hands of an illegal immigrant.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan Democrats look toward a future that some hope includes Pete Buttigieg
item.description: MONROE, Mich. (AP) — In a packed union hall outside Detroit, a worker shifts the conversation from policy to the personal, quizzing Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg on his knowledge of Michigan, the state he only recently started calling home.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to look for in Supreme Court arguments over environmental regulation of Utah oil railway plan
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A proposed western railroad expansion aimed at boosting crude oil production in Utah is coming before the Supreme Court Tuesday in a case that could have wider impact on federal environmental regulation.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pete Hegseth, Tulsi Gabbard on Capitol Hill to get Senate support
item.description: Two of President-elect Donald Trump's most controversial cabinet nominees are on Capitol Hill this week.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Shafer, NewsNation

item.title: Congress races toward fast-approaching government shutdown deadline
item.description: Congress has just 10 days until government funding is set to run out, and lawmakers don’t have a deal to keep the lights on during the holidays. Members on both sides of the aisle expect the government will stay open past the Dec. 20 shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, Fox 5

item.title: How Biden – and Trump – helped make the pardon go haywire
item.description: With new life breathed into it by President Biden breaking his repeated promises not to issue one for Hunter, the pardon debate is spinning entirely out of hand.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here's how the US is countering the Islamic State group during Syria's upheaval
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Massive U.S. airstrikes on Islamic State militants in Syria were meant in part as a message to the group and a move to ensure that it doesn't try to take advantage of the chaos following the overthrow of President Bashar Assad's government. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk warns Republicans against standing in Trump's way — or his
item.description: DES MOINES, Iowa (AP) — A week after President-elect Donald Trump’s victory, Elon Musk said his political action committee would “play a significant role in primaries.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, JULIET LINDERMAN and MARTHA MENDOZA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats frustrated with Biden's 'lame duck' end to presidency
item.description: With 42 days until President Joe Biden cedes power, some Democrats are exasperated at how he is spending his final days in the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Lara Trump stepping down as RNC co-chair and addressing speculation about Florida Senate seat
item.description: Lara Trump will step down as co-chair of the Republican National Committee as she considers a number of potential options with her father-in-law, President-elect Donald Trump, set to return to the White House. Among those possibilities is replacing Florida Sen.
item.dc:creator: JULIET LINDERMAN and MARTHA MENDOZA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US says terror designation doesn't bar talks with Syrian rebel group
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The State Department said Monday it is not actively reviewing the “foreign terrorist organization” designation of the main Syrian rebel group that overthrew Bashar Assad’s government this weekend.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP senator questions FBI over reported Iranian hack attempt of Trump pick Kash Patel
item.description: Sen. Thom Tillis is probing the FBI over a reported cyberattack on Kash Patel and how quickly information was spread to the media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House Republican eyes Medicare, Social Security for DOGE cuts
item.description: Rep. Mark Alford (R-Mo.) is floating Medicare and Social Security as potential areas of focus for President-elect Trump’s new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's 'Meet the Press' interview
item.description: Trump spoke with "Meet the Press" moderator Kristen Welker, and the two discussed Trump's plans for his first day in office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Talking Sense: Coming together to solve tough problems
item.description: Mariah Levison and Rob Fersh help people find consensus on how to solve divisive issues, ranging from prison reform to what art should hang in the Minnesota Capitol. Learn how they do it in this MPR News Talking Sense conversation hosted by MPR News correspondent Catharine Richert.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis, Catharine Richert, Maja Beckstrom, and Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are bringing Trump’s DOGE to Capitol Hill
item.description: The leaders of the so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” are calling for large-scale layoffs of federal workers and the elimination of some federal agencies during Trump's second term.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News

item.title: Majority of Supreme Court seems reluctant to block state bans on medical treatments for minors
item.description: Hearing a high-profile culture-war clash, a majority of the Supreme Court seemed reluctant Wednesday to block Tennessee’s ban on gender-affirming care for minors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court hears challenge to law banning gender-affirming care for trans kids
item.description: At issue is a Tennessee law that bans access to hormones, puberty blockers, and other treatments for trans kids in the state.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg, MPR News

item.title: Inside RFK Jr.'s nonprofit's legal battles over vaccines and public health
item.description: The nonprofit Children's Health Defense that Kennedy led has filed nearly 30 federal and state lawsuits since 2020, many challenging vaccines and public health mandates.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond, MPR News

item.title: Elon Musk's more than $50 billion pay deal at Tesla was rejected again. Here is why
item.description: A judge in Delaware has for the second time struck down a compensation package for Elon Musk after a Tesla shareholder filed suit.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota House panel votes to absorb legal fees of DFLer in employment dispute
item.description: A DFL state lawmaker will have legal fees covered by the Minnesota House after alleging her rights were violated by an outside employer. Republicans say the move sets a bad precedent.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, MPR News
